scripts.build: wp-scripts build --webpack-src-dir=ui-src --output-path=ui-src-build && terser ui-src-assets/js/frontend-switch.js -c -m -o ui-src-build/frontend-switch.js && cleancss -o ui-src-build/sso-switch.css ui-src-assets/css/sso-switch.css && cleancss -o ui-src-build/admin-ui.css ui-src-assets/css/admin-ui.css
